The chain yields given in the data table were
calculated from the cumulative yields and the charge
distribution formula using ZP from R.
Vandeplosch et al.,(Nuclear fission, Academic Press,
1973, p.325), and a constant width of 0.8 charge units.

DATA: replaced floating point to fixed point values.
Gamma ray peaks of the fission products given
in the data table were measured repeatedly after
different decay times. The data points were fitted and
the decay curve extrapolated to zero decay time in
order to get the independent yield. The method for
calculating the fractional yields is not given.
No information on source of uncertainties.
Data taken from Table 5 of publication.
